name: build_run
description: Triggers a new EAS build using a build profile from eas.json. Requires a GitHub repository to be connected to the project. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app").

appId.description: The Expo project/app ID (UUID). Get this from app.json at "extra.eas.projectId". Either appId or appFullName is required.

appFullName.description: The full name of the app (e.g., "@owner/my-app"). Use this if you don't have access to app.json. Either appId or appFullName is required.

platform.description: The platform to build for (ANDROID or IOS)

buildProfile.description: The build profile name from eas.json (e.g., "development", "preview", "production")

gitRef.description: Git reference (branch name, tag, or commit SHA) to build from

autoSubmit.description: Whether to automatically submit the build after completion

submitProfile.description: Submit profile to use if autoSubmit is true
